_meta.stage: 4 -- VALUES-CALL (b): what makes a group 'critical' (protected regardless of size)
_meta.status: PROPOSED / ASSERTED -- director confirms or adjusts. Changeable; the frontier's critical-coverage half rebuilds from these predicates.
_meta.principle: These groups are protected REGARDLESS of size: they barely register on volume-weighted variance but carry regulatory, affordability and mortality weight out of all proportion to count. A segment is justified if it captures one of these, even if it adds ~zero valuable variance. This is the deliberately-separate second objective (never blended into variance).

criteria_families_offered.vulnerability: PSR-adjacent / assisted-channel / mobility- or health-limited proxies -- Ofgem Priority Services Register duty.
criteria_families_offered.affordability_mortality: fuel-poverty + off-gas high-bill + winter-mortality exposure (the excess-winter-deaths tail).
criteria_families_offered.regulatory: groups where a supplier carries a specific licence-condition duty (prepayment protections, self-disconnection, vulnerable-customer principles).

_meta.coverage_definition: A critical group is COVERED at a given segmentation once its members are ISOLATABLE -- i.e. they fall into segment(s) pure enough (dominant-group share >= purity threshold, default 0.60) that the business can treat them distinctly without sweeping in unrelated customers. Coverage is a fraction over the protected set.
_meta.note_on_predicates: Predicates use ONLY the 12 open cohort dimensions (no unobserved fields). They are proxies (e.g. assisted-channel proxies PSR/vulnerability; social-rent+unemployed proxies fuel-poverty) -- asserted, refutable, and exactly the honest-proxy discipline stage-3 used for the named worst cells.
_meta.widening_invitation: REFRAME 2026-07-20 (DIRECTOR_STEER_SEGMENTATION_LEARNING_VALUE_REFRAME): protection is now a FLOOR OUTSIDE the ranking (critical_group_bonus removed from the score) -- no metric, learning value included, can demote a regulatorily-significant group below full-fidelity modelling. The director asked this set to WIDEN if anything. This iteration keeps the 5 groups unchanged (they already span affordability/mortality, vulnerability/PSR and prepayment-regulatory families) rather than fabricate predicates the director has not seen; widening is a values-call the director makes on reacting to the reframed frontier. Candidate directions to react to (NOT adopted): a medical-equipment/health-dependency proxy, a pensioner-proxy (needs an age dimension the 12 do not currently carry -- a generator-side ask), and a debt-in-collections proxy once an arrears state is observable. Bring widening back with the generator [ACT], not before.

groups.label: Fuel-poor off-gas households
groups.why_critical: Off-gas fuels carry the highest unit bills; low-class renters have least headroom. This is where fuel poverty and excess winter mortality concentrate. Maps to stage-3 named worst cell oil_fuel_poor_rural.

groups.label: Vulnerable / PSR-adjacent (assisted channel)
groups.why_critical: Assisted-channel + low-class proxies the Priority Services Register cohort: disability, age, health, no-digital-access. Ofgem licence-condition duty of care regardless of commercial value.

groups.label: All-electric flats, renters (self-disconnection risk)
groups.why_critical: Electric-only flats face high standing+unit costs and prepayment/self-disconnection risk; concentrated in London. Maps to stage-3 named worst cell all_electric_flat_london.

groups.label: Off-grid rural low-income (oil/LPG, Wales/SW)
groups.why_critical: Rural off-grid on unregulated heating-oil markets, no price cap on the fuel, poor public-transport substitution -- a distinct affordability tail from urban prepayment.

groups.label: Prepayment-proxy social renters, non-digital
groups.why_critical: Proxies the traditional-prepayment-meter cohort with the strongest self-disconnection and regulatory-protection profile; carries specific licence duties independent of margin.
